title: KandyToys World of Science Crystal Gems Digging Kit | Science Kit | Excavation Kits For Kids
features: Feel like a real archaeologist and dig out five different buried gemstones
A hands-on introduction to STEM, educational and fun, ideal interactive play for curious minds
Dig through a plaster rock to find 5 hidden imitation crystal gems!
Includes: block, chisel and cleaning brush
description: Crystal Gems Digging Kit The kit contains a plaster rock with 5 imitation crystal gems to discover. Equipment supplied in the box includes a chisel and cleaning brush. The imitation crystal gems included in the box may vary. WARNING: This item contains tools with functional sharp points and should only be used under adult supervision. Digging into the rocks will create dust and small particles, we recommend that you lay out a cover or newspapers to catch any debris. If any dust comes into contact with eyes, flush thoroughly with cold water.
